6 varieties of apples planted by the Quad City Food Forest on city land for the public to pick for non commercial uses for free. 4 trees still remain. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: August-October.
Polly variety peach planted by the Quad City Food Forest on city land for the public to pick for non commercial uses for free. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: August-August.
Reliance variety peach planted by the Quad City Food Forest on city land for the public to pick for non commercial uses for free. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: August-August.
Contender variety peach planted by the Quad City Food Forest on city land for the public to pick for non commercial uses for free. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: August-August.

7 varieties of European plum planted by the Quad City Food Forest on city land for the public to pick for non commercial uses for free. 3 or 4 of the trees still remain. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: August-September.
Black Rasberries bushes along the tree line behind a culvisack. There are a dozen or more bushes. Schuetzen Park property. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: June-unknown.
